coverage_note: The bundled MYH7 population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from MYH7 beta-myosin heavy-chain motor activity, sarcomere contraction, ATPase force generation, and cardiomyopathy biology and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000092054: MYH7 coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: MYH7 findings should be read against beta-myosin heavy-chain motor activity, sarcomere contraction, ATPase force generation, and cardiomyopathy biology; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.

MYH7 p.Arg403Gln / R403Q is curated as a MYH7 marker for Hypertrophic and dilated cardiomyopathy review context, Sarcomere force generation and ATPase motor biology; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.

MYH7 sarcomere motor-function model is curated as a MYH7 marker for Hypertrophic and dilated cardiomyopathy review context, Sarcomere force generation and ATPase motor biology; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
